name: Chow Formulation and Dose Verification
preprompt: Specify preparation or procurement of encapsulated rapamycin chow at 14 ppm and matched eudragit-only control chow. Include formulation details, storage, stability/QC checks, batch labeling, and how the approximate mg/kg/day exposure is justified or estimated.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components. Write: own data only.
summary: Defines the treatment and control diets and how dose consistency is verified. This component ensures the intervention is chemically and operationally matched except for rapamycin.
